findings.claim_text: ICE and Ornn announced plans on May 19, 2026 to launch U.S. dollar-denominated, cash-settled GPU compute futures based on OCPI, subject to regulatory approval.
Ornn says OCPI is built from executed or cleared transactions rather than listings, offers, surveys, or scraped list prices.
CME Group and Silicon Data announced on May 12, 2026 plans to launch compute futures later in 2026, pending regulatory review.
